title: cardamine californica var. cuneata
intro: Cardamine californica var. cuneata, also known as Western bugloss or California bittercress, is a perennial plant native to the Pacific coast of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bitter and astringent compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Cardamine californica var. cuneata include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as sore throats and fever.
